sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72445" key="oi)nagwgo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰν-ᾰγωγός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n72445.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carrying wine,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:370" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">370</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:143:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">143.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
